name: Nexus Phase: Erase
description: A plate of smooth dark stone, geometrically perfect, completely featureless — no symbols, no markings. Absorbs all ambient light with no reflection, a void-black matte. Hairline seams barely visible under raking light suggest panels; one side hides a hidden hollow chamber no larger than a walnut for the resonant stone. Always warm to the touch. Heavier than its size should allow.
note: Also known as The Null. Carried by Drusniel. Visual opposite of the Beacon: emits nothing, absorbs everything.
